name: Aurum
description: Aurum (ARM) is the native utility token of the AurumSwap protocol on BNB Smart Chain. ARM is a minimal, immutable ERC-20 with no admin functions: total supply of 100,000,000 was minted at deployment and cannot change. Holders may burn their own tokens via burn() / burnFrom(). The token powers a non-custodial staking pool with variable APR and a Chainlink-bound zap for one-click USDT/BNB onboarding. Source code is verified on BscScan.
